SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_AMALGAMATOR.title: The Amalgamator
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_AMALGAMATOR.pages.INITI: A moss-covered machine hums with unfamiliar sympathy. Its metal palms do not ask for Strikes or Defends. They ask for two matching starter cards, then promise a clearer shape in return.
You do not have two removable Gales.
You do not have two removable Sieges.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_AMALGAMATOR.pages.COMBI: The Gales twist together until their movement becomes a sprinting technique.
The Sieges close, overlap, and settle into a protective barrier.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_WOOD_CARVINGS.title: Wood Carvings
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_WOOD_CARVINGS.pages.INI: Three small carvings rest in a hollow trunk. Their shapes feel less like weapons and shields than possibilities waiting to be named.
Transform a Sakura Starter Card into Silver Moon Wing.
Give a Sakura Starter Card permanent Release.
Locked: Requires a Sakura Starter Card without Release.
All eligible Sakura Starter Cards are already Released.
Transform a Sakura Starter Card into Sealed Book.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_WOOD_CARVINGS.pages.BIR: The bird carving warms in your hand. One starter card unfolds into a pale wing.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_WOOD_CARVINGS.pages.SNA: The snake carving curls once around the card, then disappears. The card remembers how to open.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_WOOD_CARVINGS.pages.TOR: The torus turns once, and a starter card folds into a sealed page.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SPIRALING_WHIRLPOOL.pag: A dark whirlpool turns below the path. Its spiral does not pull at ordinary Strikes or Defends. It follows the movement of Gale and the walls of Siege.
Apply Spiral to a Gale or Siege.
Locked: Requires an unenchanted Gale or Siege.
You have no Gale or Siege that can receive Spiral.
Heal for 33% of your Max HP.
You watch until the whirlpool's pattern settles onto a card.
The water is cold, strange, and unexpectedly restorative.
